# zstack_primary_storage (Resource)

Manage ZStack primary storage. Supports LocalStorage, NFS, Ceph, and SharedBlock types.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the primary storage.
- `type` (String) The type of primary storage (LocalStorage, NFS, Ceph, SharedBlock).
- `zone_uuid` (String) The UUID of the zone this primary storage belongs to.

### Optional

- `attached_cluster_uuids` (List of String) List of cluster UUIDs to attach this primary storage to.
- `data_volume_pool_name` (String) The data volume pool name (for Ceph type).
- `description` (String) The description of the primary storage.
- `disk_uuids` (List of String) List of shared block disk UUIDs (required for SharedBlock type).
- `image_cache_pool_name` (String) The image cache pool name (for Ceph type).
- `mon_urls` (List of String) List of Ceph monitor URLs (required for Ceph type).
- `root_volume_pool_name` (String) The root volume pool name (for Ceph type).
- `url` (String) The URL/path for the primary storage (required for LocalStorage and NFS types).

### Read-Only

- `available_capacity` (Number) The available capacity in bytes.
- `available_physical_capacity` (Number) The available physical capacity in bytes.
- `mount_path` (String) The mount path of the primary storage.
- `state` (String) The state of the primary storage (Enabled, Disabled).
- `status` (String) The status of the primary storage (Connected, Disconnected).
- `total_capacity` (Number) The total capacity in bytes.
- `total_physical_capacity` (Number) The total physical capacity in bytes.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the primary storage.
